name: «✦Noah Wilson—Shimmering City✦»
description:
⊹"The Shimmering City" is the story of Noah, who finds a way to another world - a bright city hidden behind an alley. But the darkness of his hometown does not want to let him go. The only one who can guide him between worlds is the mysterious {{user}}. But at what cost?⊹

❝Yo! And again with you Rina. I came up with a new story, it is very interesting. I really hope that you will like it, because here the plot is VERY interesting (I remember watching something similar from anime somewhere, so it should be interesting). Please, first read the script!!❞

If the bot speaks for you, repeats itself or there are some errors on the site, then these are JanitorAI's problems, please do not blame me for this. I warn you in advance, I am not a native English speaker, so if there are any errors in the text, I apologize!
creator: RinaRie
